one_liner: GME up 3.6% with Wyckoff Accumulation A-B signals and Grade B fundamentals (unusual for a meme stock) — high Reddit mentions (34) but negative FCF; watch the $20.93 support.

news_catalyst.headline: GameStop Active on Reddit — Cash-Rich Balance Sheet Supports Floor
news_catalyst.summary: GME is up 3.6% today with 34 Reddit mentions — the highest social mention count in the watchlist after AAPL (49). GameStop now holds substantial cash from prior equity offerings, improving its Grade B fundamental score. However, the core retail gaming business generates negative FCF, making the fundamental case speculative. Wyckoff shows Accumulation Phase A-B (2/5 signals) with bullish bias. The meme stock dynamic makes this position sizing-sensitive.

technical.summary: GME showing Accumulation A-B signals with RSI at 52 and support at $20.93 just $0.83 below current price. MACD is in a slight bearish crossover despite the bullish Wyckoff reading. Volume below average. The tight support ($20.93) limits downside risk if held — but upside to resistance at $25.75 is only 18%.

key_strengths: Large cash balance from equity raises provides downside floor
key_concerns: Negative FCF from declining core retail gaming business
fundamentals.summary: Grade B is misleading — it reflects the cash-heavy balance sheet, not business quality. The operating business is in structural decline. Watch for news of the cash being deployed (acquisition, buyback, investment) as the key catalyst.

risks: Meme stock dynamics — can reverse violently on no news
Negative FCF from core business — cash is being depleted
MACD bearish crossover despite Wyckoff accumulation signals
No clear capital allocation plan for cash reserve
